# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  DEPLOY_TAG: "v${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - ./build.sh
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
  notifications:
    email:
      recipients:
        - developer@example.com
      template:
        merge_request_title: "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        merge_request_description: "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - ./deploy.sh $DEPLOY_TAG
  only:
    - merge_requests
  notifications:
    email:
      recipients:
        - deployment@example.com
      template:
        merge_request_title: "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        merge_request_description: "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
